channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Trees and shrubs, 28th May
item.description:
Trees overhanging pavement and shrubs encroaching pavement making it difficult to walk on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Elmers End Road outside Birkbeck railwa, 28th May
item.description:
Elmers End Road outside Birkbeck railway station is a pedestrian crossing with traffic lights. The black box which I assume controls these lights which is on the opposite side of the road to the railway station is graffiti tagged. Google Streetview: https://www.google.com/maps/place/Croydon+Rd,+London+SE20+7SX/@51.4040899,-0.0556096,3a,23.3y,113.99h,88.58t/data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1sdQA33Mgk8DNbLPz7zWpM6A!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fcb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile%26w%3D900%26h%3D600%26pitch%3D1.4196902244217284%26panoid%3DdQA33Mgk8DNbLPz7zWpM6A%26yaw%3D113.98694245598084!7i16384!8i8192!4m6!3m5!1s0x48760112a0ff5c2f:0x128dcd77d742e657!8m2!3d51.408805!4d-0.0587512!16s%2Fg%2F1tlvn_k6?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDUyNi4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 28th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clarence Crescent, Albany Park, Greater London

item.title: Elmers End Road SE20 Aldi supermarket at 97 Croydon, 28th May
item.description:
Elmers End Road SE20 Aldi supermarket at 97 Croydon Rd, London SE20 7SX. On its side wall on Elmers End Road there are two grey fire exit door (either side of parcel pick-up and drop-off lockers) both graffiti tagged – Google Streetview: https://www.google.com/maps/place/Croydon+Rd,+London+SE20+7SX/@51.4082244,-0.059255,3a,75y,62.87h,88.23t/data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1sscJJgggOuDSHqXL8IRGwRA!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fcb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile%26w%3D900%26h%3D600%26pitch%3D1.7663505372184858%26panoid%3DscJJgggOuDSHqXL8IRGwRA%26yaw%3D62.8736716363084!7i16384!8i8192!4m6!3m5!1s0x48760112a0ff5c2f:0x128dcd77d742e657!8m2!3d51.408805!4d-0.0587512!16s%2Fg%2F1tlvn_k6?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDUyNi4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Anerley Hill SE19 opposite side of the road to, 28th May
item.description:
Anerley Hill SE19 opposite side of the road to number 16 / Grosvenor Court green box graffiti tagged.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Queen Adelaide Road SE20 all the streetlights on, 28th May
item.description:
Queen Adelaide Road SE20 all the streetlights on this road were on at 19.30hrs this evening. Clearly something wrong has gone wrong with their timers.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen Adelaide Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing wooden rail, 28th May
item.description:
Missing wooden rail along zig zag path leading from gardens out to the Churchill theatre. (Part of rail has received a temporary repair, but now another piece of rail has gone missing.)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Churchill Way, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Graffiti on cabinet

item.title: Denmark Hill SE5, junction with Champion Park. Ages authorised advertisement affixed to railing., 28th May

Please clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Fly tip sofa, 28th May
item.description:
Sofa there for a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Georges Way, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous abandoned bat and trailer, 28th May
item.description:
The boat and trailer that was abandoned on the road on the morning of the 10th May is still blocking oncoming traffic for residents trying to exit their driveways safely, causing near misses. Please advise if you have sourced cctv from its original location by Aylesofrd timber to being dumped on Eden park Avenue and if you have traced the owner for it to be moved.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Eden Park Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 481 Blackfen Road renting out outbuilding without appropriate licensing, 28th May
item.description:
Good evening, I am aware that an officer has inspected the main building last year on suspicion of this being an unlicensed HMO and we have been informed that the main building is used for assisted living which we have not been aware off. However, we have also raised in the same report that the outbuilding at the back of the garden is rented out without appropriate planning permission and the officer as well as ourselves have been told that is used as a storage unit. Once again, the person renting the outbuilding has changed and I hope that the attached images are enough proof that the outbuilding is indeed used as a self contained living space and not as a storage unit as previously stated by the people working at the assisted living. I have no issues with the assisted living but the consistent change of residents, police attendance, smoking of marijuhana in the garden and noise even late at night worries me in another perfectly respectful neighbourhood. Best wishes, Janine

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westerham Drive, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Biohazard food waste bin added to flytipping grotspot, 28th May
item.description:
There is a bin which is always surrounded by flytipped rubbish, broken furniture and mattresses which gets cleared days after being dumped. This is next to a busy bus stop. Whoever signed off on the installation of an additional food waste bin next to the dump must really really hate bus passengers and pedestrians. Filth and flies. Seriously, Southwark??

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell Green, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown weeds, 28th May
item.description:
Nettles and weeds over growing and becoming a problem for pedestrians. Weeds need killing or cutting down.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Withens Close, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging tree, 28th May
item.description:
No.16 have not cut this tree/bush in 5 years and is now taking over the public footpath

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Okemore Gardens, St Mary Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Non-consensual closure of Petherton Road for Arsenal Parade, 28th May
item.description:
Petherton Road residents were not consulted on whether Arsenal Football club can unilaterally take control of our road for the day. Why not? We’re not all Arsenal fans. Will AFC reimburse us?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Petherton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bin, 28th May
item.description:
Graffiti on bin - please remove

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pownall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Purple paint spilled on public carriageway, 28th May
item.description:
Outside No 87 Alliance Road. Will spread all over if not properly cleaned up promptly . Spilt there approx 1800 hrs this evening .

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alliance Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned barrier and two cones by the 367 bus stop on Beckenham Grove near to Scotts Lane, 28th May
item.description:
The barrier and cones have been left on the pavement for two weeks. It appears they were used when tree cutting took place and have been abandoned. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Grove, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
